star_1.text: Super fun game, great graphics. Good power ups. Fun stages. Unfortunately, this game requires an extreme amount of grinding. The ship is clearly underpowered so you'll be forced to pay or play an obscene amount of levels to build stars. After playing a ton, I'm still barely past level 5. Cant recommend this unless they fix it.

You can't transfer your progress from 1 device to another. Only part of my progress transfers. You have to start all over when you get a new device. That is uncalled for. They can do better. I had saved my gameplay in my Google acct. yet only part of the progress is saved leaving you to earn them again. + NONE of the stars transfer. I had over a mil stars. It's like you're punished for upgrading your devices. Ads run after every play so 15 min temp card is spent watching ads. No deleting them.

Uninstalled BOTH versions within a few days because of several issues, which are actually worse in the new version... Navigating the screen during combat is very tricky; your finger is always blocking part of it, especially when you move around to catch stars or avoid baddies... Reaching unrealistically high goals in the first level is made even worse because the basic weapon is very hard to see, especially in this one... Can't shoot things if you can't see what or where you're shooting...

this is a great game but the ONLY issue is that the in rounds weapon "upgrades" do nothing at all ! all you have to do to verify this is decompile the programme and you can see there was a zero effect ... such a shame as it is a good game

Devs, why can't I be restored to my old progress yet the game is connected to Google play service? I redownload the game to my new phone just to stuck in the beginning, it takes a lot to beat the game only to lost your progress, this can't be right.

not only have I lost all my progress twice after unlocking almost everything but you greedy fcs now shove stupid ads after each run. if I paid for something don't show me ads, you made more than enough money on the 50 different platforms you have the game on

NONSENSE UPDATE game is filled with too many bugs on stage 12 and other stages , bad graphics quality previous were fine. Not able kill enemies and get green box because of too many glitches nonsense game 😡😡😡😡😡
Now this game becomes boring. Kindly add some new but most hard & Difficult games. add some new weapons for create interest.
I used to love this game so much. The latest update changed the zoom level of all the missions, the game feels completely different now. 😭
I just opened it recently and it says "Failed to load II2CPP" cant get in to the game, hope this fix the issue

I really like the game, but it's either a bug or it's intentional, I can't say for sure, the prestige rewards I earn in "TALENTOUS PERSON" when I collect gifts, the time doesn't register and the time registers but then regresses, is not being recorded. I was supposed to complete this goal and I'm stuck. In this case, I purchased the advertising removal, so no videos appear when collecting gifts.
Far too grindy to upgrade and the requirements are ridiculously high.

Been playing for over 3 years. Spent about £50. I still can't afford a lot of things, things double, triple and quadruple in price as you build. Money doesn't. I even paid to double my money, still not enough to upgrade. Also, I'm tired of waiting 3 hours for my ship to upgrade, and I'm not paying thousands to speed that up. Really loved this game, but greed is a disgusting face you wear. Enjoy my £50.

When I make an in app purchase I expect it to work all the time, not just when it's convenient for the developer! I got the star doubler but to my surprise it only works when I have an internet connection, presumably so that you're still able to push ads (that have nothing to do with the IAP). I bought it, it's mine! You don't get to choose when I can have it and when I can't. The game is good, but just for that you deserve zero stars for being greedy.

Graphics are ok .. but the game itself is too hard. And with that i mean getting the upgrades, advancing with the missions and getting the gold.  -It takes forever to get any weapon upgrades which means you have to play the same missions over and over and over.  I will definitely uninstall now .. and hope for something better ... like the Phoenix Hawk game.   DONT WASTE YOUR TIME HERE

I am not receiving double stars while offline. The lottery mechanic to find cards *******SUCKS. Paying over 6k in stars for the radar to not land on the card? That's a garbage mechanic. Loosing cards on death is a garbage mechanic. I have beat the game 5 times now and unlocked almost all difficulty levels. And haven't found half the cards yet or unlocked all the ships. If you're thinking about playing this game. Don't. Till these issues are resolved

seems like a good game, then you realize unless you're willing to spend lots of money, you will spend hours grinding the same levels dozens of times to unlock enough upgrades to make later levels and higher difficulties even playable. Oh, and you'll spend more time watching ads than actually playing. A good schmup should have lots of levels and throw challenges at you mostly based on skill. Instead, this game gives you a handful of levels and demands you pay them or spend hours grinding to win

they start you out full ammo, guns and lasers, then downgrade to make you wanna play. it seems as tho if you don't buy anything it becomes harder to pass levels. after the 3rd level it takes days to do the same thing you've done days before to achieve the same result that you would have 3 days ago and still won't let you advance levels. good graphics but lousy planning!!!

Decent game... But once you get so far its almost impossible. I've added "friends" but they must be modding/cheating somehow, as their scores are inhumanly high. You also can't sign in to Facebook on android then on ios and switch between platforms with your up to date save. It plays as two separate accounts. 👎🏻

While there's a good amount of advertising in this app, I feel like there might be a little too much game in between the ads. I commend you for putting double ads after every run - one before "rewards" and one right after! Amazing! Maybe even add a few during the combat, too, for special upgrades! Heck, put one in to just skip the level entirely!

star_2.text: The lack of variety with the levels provided prevents this game from reaching 5 stars. In addition, while it doesn't cost much to pay for additional ammo and upgrades, a lot of investment is needed to beat harder courses. UPDATE: How on Earth is it possible after wasting my money (I'm embarrassed and hate myself now) maxing every component out and obtaining all the cards that I can't complete nightmare levels or obtained all the different kinds of aircraft. Ridiculous! Two stars LOST!

Fun for a while, but it gets way too grindey in the later levels. It's very difficult to complete the game without paying for micro transactions. Even with the Star Doubler upgrade, you will have to play each level multiple times until your fingers fall off to level your plane enough to beat all the levels on all 3 difficulties. I would rather just pay $2 for the game and not have these elements.

Liked it at first,but then I realized the game killed me without me getting hit by missiles so it could switch to a commercial. Then when it was time for me skip the commercial or close the commercial the Skip and close buttons would not respond. So I uninstalled the game. It's called pricing yourself right out of a job. I just go somewhere else. By.

This game would be great if they didn't chop everything up into small expensive pieces for the player to buy. Having to buy planes to keep playing is cheap at first but it gets more and more expensive as the game goes on. For me its 2 hours or 700 stars to repair a plane. At no point should a player be unable to play a game. The difficulty difference from normal to hard to hardest adds health and rate of fire to the enemy. The health boost forces you to upgrade your weapons if you want to finish the levels. Unfortunately upgrades, which are the core of this games progression, eventually take hours to finish and thousands of stars to purchase. My level 5 main cannon requires 3,800 stars and over 2 hours to install, with another 700 to rush it. To add to this price hike one upgrade is about 1 20th of an impactful upgrade. At level 2 (the number on the left, not the bar) you will see a difference for some of your weapons. The cards and ship parts are very important. One ship you can build increases main cannon damage by 10% and it is very noticeable. If you can get 5 parts to appear (only one per map and you have to finish it) and you get them for the same ship you might get one for yourself. The cards are the same way but have powerful effects. One card will provide you with a shield if you're about to die, another gives you a helper drone, one let's you pick up upgrades on the map like the laser cannon. Again it is luck based, except for cards you can spend lots of stars to maybe find one on a map. The levels are beautiful and 3 difficulties is a nice addition but if you want to get to the later levels you will be grinding the earlier ones on the harder difficulties before you ever see stage 8. This game has all the concepts of a good game but the execution of... well a mobile game trying to force you to buy stars so the grind doesn't feel so bad.

Awesome game, but progress is so slow. And you have to replay the same levels over and over and over. People like variety. I don't mind grinding, but the same maps all the time kill it for me. Upgrading takes coins and time, I don't mind the slow grind to upgrade ship, but need more maps. Only have 4 unlocked so far. And it's getting repetitive and I'm losing interest.

My first experience was not too bad, I completed the first mission and boss or so I thought... As the boss was destroyed I flew to pick up the loot and was instantly blown up and forced to restart the mission. Absolutely crazy difficulty for the first mission this turned me off from the game and after a few more attempts I ultimately found it to be more of a chore than game.
Graphics are great, but gameplay isn't for everyone. Got 3-4 days or $good amount to pass a level? Install it, otherwise the rewards system might just be a roadblock

Is this a good game? Kind of. Do you like grinding the same mission to get enough stars to upgrade your ship to get enough medals to advance? The controls are ok. I think there are other ships but they seem very difficult to unlock. What takes this down to 2 stars is the ads. Top War can honk on Bobo. There's an ad after every mission. TL;DR this game doesn't have enough variety to be worth your time. Ad-free version not worth your money.

more ads in the update! - after you play a game it used to show you a static ad that you could close straight away. Now, it makes you watch a 30 second ad. The game crashes now and again, more so after the update. Also, I had the longer rope(?) card which was better at first, but it seems to be nerfed as i literally have to be almost above pilots to save them!

I like this game. I even bought the star doubler, which was the first purchase I made for a phone game. While waiting for an appointment, I decided to pass a few minutes playing it, and when I got to the end of the level the stars didn't double. I was confuse and played it again, and low and behold I was right in that it didn't double the stars. I quickly found out that it is because I was playing offline. I paid money only to have the feature not work. Terrible.

Very pretty game, good controls, and fun to play. However, this is one of those free to play games that's almost impossible to advance through at anything close to an entertaining pace due to the fact that they expect you to make in-game purchases, which, after watching all the 30 second ads they throw your way.....

It's a ok game you have to be under some one's ruling thumb, or pay to play if thatsloop what they want i dont have to play or have on my device it seems that when you are getting ahead enemy's bullet balls will slow down or stop moving. My game will some times starts to lag out and i have to buy more players with cash or wait till several hours to get more ships. All the stupid little quirks to entertain ones one's self. Can't explain how when you get 100% enemies destroyed 100% of everything and you get a lower number of stars than 70,000 you get 100% or more than 71,000 you get 100 % but you don't get 100% for anything in 71,000?😕. It is real convenient the game glitches during boss fight and you get destroyed. Wow i ha CD e played for weeks to get enough coin to up grade weapons and still not worth it game glitches even when on on Wi-Fi

I have been playing this game for almost 8 years (from Symbian Platform). The only thing that has been annoying me for years is its data saving procedure. Once after playing after a long break, it showed me half the progress I had completed, for which I had to play it again till the end. Thid time it isn't showing me correct number of stars as it shows only 150 as I had more than 170k stars. I have completed all card hunting and found all planes. Please solve this problem for me ASAP.

On level 5 you take away the guns. That is so bad of an idea that the level literally ruins the game for me. Get rid of it. **Edit: Its not about it being demanding. Its about inserting something devoid of enjoyment in an otherwise enjoyable game. Its about charging money for upgrades and having a boring level that takes it all away and trys to tell you its still fun. Its not. Its garbage. Listen to your people. Get rid of it.

Waaaay too much going on. Between trying to save people and destroy tanks and planes...its visually cluttered. The single stream of bullets is woefully underpowered. Graphics are great, but at a cost to gameplay IMO. How your supposed to achieve all the goals just by sliding your finger around is beyond me. The stars dont collect easily unless youre right on top of them. Game could be loads of fun if it were dialed down a bit and made slightly easier to play.

I liked it at first since I've played the steam version but even after buying double stars and multiple star packs with my Google survey rewards credit the game is still unbearably grindy, my God. What's worse is this version puts a cool down timer after every one you do, but you can bypass this with, you guessed it- more stars. The worst part is that I have my cannon and missiles maxed out and Im horribly underpowered. Felt like a giant waste of time.

It's a really good game, but I have two major issues with it. When I switched phones, I lost all my progress (and I had made considerable progress). Also, when I open the app, the timers keep malfunctioning for the ad based reward and for the upgrades. I have to shut down and reopen the app 5-10 times before the timers return back to normal (temporarily).

Doesn't play well on a mobile device, as your finger gets in the way. Yes, I've tried both control options. The 2nd one is definitely better, but when controlling near the edge of the screen, your finger will still ultimately cover the ship. Repositioning your finger constantly is the only way. The game experience with a controller is the best, but also the using the touchscreen inside a Tesla offers a better touchscreen experience.

Enjoy playing level two from the beginning over and over again. You don't get multiple ships per level. Just one. If you die, watch an ad and start all over again. You can't move on to another level without getting all four metrics first including taking no damage and killing 100% of the enemy. Good luck with that. Also, you will rub a hole in most screen protectors due to how it is controlled. It will become noticeable. Cool LOOKING game with poor execution.

// Update: You can't get the 2x multiplyer if you're blocking the hundreds and hundreds of personal data requests it makes. You only get the extra points, if you sell them your privacy. // I paid for the 2x Star feature, and it's no longer working. I could Force Stop the app, and it would work for a while, and now that won't even fix the problem.

star_3.text: The core of this game is very good (satisfying gameplay, upgrade system, graphics) but it's VERY grindy, EVEN WITH double points enabled and ads removed. Some levels are just not possible without substantial upgrades, and then on top of it you have to wait for upgrades to install (or pay extra in-game currency to speed it up). I want to max everything out but I'm struggling to maintain interest.

This was a good game, but as usual, developers get greedy and end up screwing up the only good things they have going. You used to be able to take your finger off the screen and the ship would stay put/time would slow down... now time slows down and your ship auto-centers itself on the screen no matter what destruction it will cross to get there. There used to be no ads on the game, but now there is. I would say more about the character/quality of people who ruin good things, but it won't change.

The game is really fun, most of the time. I've lost temporal cards 3 times in a row now; as soon as im awarded the temporal card the game crashes and i lose the entire 15 minutes. What's even more frustrating is when i started spending money on the game is when it started crashing. Hopefully it's just a coincidence. I'll give 5 stars once the problem is fixed.

Pretty game, had this installed for a long time and keep trying to come back to it. Gameplay gets boring and old when you spend hours replaying the same level. No weapon powerups during play which would at least diversify the same maps a bit. I finally just realized its not going to get better from what it has been over the last year and am making more room on my phone.

pretty disappointed that the last card didn't make the laser chases the enemy(and that it is for the classic only !)! and the drones too, consider how weak the firepower are and also not wide range enough. they should lock on to the target( enemy chaser style). or at least we get to upgrades it. and the missile（it should be 2 instead of just 1)!

Beautiful graphics. Waaay too much grind. Even after paying for premium upgrades like point-doubling, the game requires endless replays of early levels in order to advance. Great looking shootemup, but who's going to grind the same levels over and over again just to play the next one? (Especially after coughing up a few bucks to speed things up?) Devs: Add the replay value to the end of the game. Not the beginning. I got bored of the tedious repetition and gave up.

Don't Waste Your Money on this game because you'll never get it back. And their support is useless! Update: After the update, I was able to get 80% of my purchases back but not all. Gave them 3 stars for effort.
had it at 5, had to bring that down when, originally, I paid to remove ads, and it looks like they've returned, and I'm forced to pay again
graphics are amazing but the controls are pretty unresponsive and the rewards are very stingy which makes it unbearably grindy. cannot recommend

I'm really enjoying the game. It's quite fun and challenging. The only complaint I have is this; I paid to have ads removed permanently, and for a while I wasn't getting any. But I have recently been getting pop ups after playing a mission. I am fine with watching ads to earn additional rewards, but I paid money to have pop ups removed and I would like them to be gone. No other complaints aside from that.

Overall a decent game. Graphics are great. No storyline just straight top down shooter. It is pretty much impossible to finish the game without paying numerous ammounts for stars to power up other than waiting a crazy amount of time. I tried to get as far as possible but after realising that I would have to spend a lot of money that I had to finish it, the game lost its appeal. Wanted to see the last level and the ending so I looked it up on YouTube. it ends. Very little in the form of an outro.

Fantastic soundtrack and sound effects. Really pretty game graphic-wise. I bought the starbooster as well. Played quite a bit, but....the biggest problem with the game is the grind and difficulty level. I mean even with the star-booster, you need to play levels again and again to be able to get all achievements and unlock the next area. It gets tiresome and not all of us are quick fingers. I don't say this often, but the difficulty needs to be lowered. Even maxed out some levels are so hard!
Bulk of the time you'll be spent here is to play past levels to grind stars which will be absolutely boring later down the line

I'm admit this game has some great things going for it. The graphics are beautifully detailed, the controls are precise and intuitive and it is challenging. But come on, did they really have to make the grind quite this punishing? There are timers applied to just about everything and upgrades are all but mandatory to progress and they cost a fortune in the stars you earn playing the game (That are, of course, purchasable). I know it's FTP, but the game goes from fun to tedious very quickly.

Fun game, really addictive at first, but gets stagnant rather quickly. Eventually, you'll reach a level too difficult to accomplish without upgrading your plane first. And to do so, you're going to have to repeat the previous levels over and over again until you get enough coins. I've reached a point where plane parts and cards are scarce, I can't pass the latest level, and all I can do is do the level with the most reward and highest probability of success. There's no sense of progress anymore.

What's the point of having to wait 30, 40, sometimes 50 minutes do use weapons you've just bought after spending hours collecting stars? There's also a limit of tentatives for each stage which is also ridiculous! I'm enjoying the game but those restrictions are ridiculous. If I have to wait 50 minutes to play again I'd rather download another game. All in all it's a great game with good graphics, so please reconsider those pointless restrictions

1) More advertisements than gaming. It's living off the legacy of the original game. Advertisements all over the game. Understanding that it can be removed by purchasing the game. 2) The developers were so lazy that they make you grind the game for more stars to unlock higher levels than actually giving you more levels. Other than that.... Still a good game. Same as the original game. Top down shooter. Hours and hours of fun. Bright colours and good graphics and fast initial load times.

Games only redeeming part is that it has stunningly great graphics & decent game play. Controls feel way too awkward for a plane shooting game, you have to let go in order to use your abilities. This takes away the feeling of continous play and it also breaks the feeling control while playing. You normally only let go in these games when you die, not when you want to use an ability. Everything else is then built on one goal in mind "MONEY". This game has the biggest money wall ever! Everything you do is stars stars stars, upgrades=stars, abilities=stars, to use abilities=stars, to play=stars and so on... Absolute joke, this could have been a great game if it wasn't for the insane amount of greed built into the game!

It would be an amazing game if not for these issues: 1. Game glitches often and ship can blow up when there are no enemy projectiles anywhere near you, and you have full health 2. I have been in levels during which the entire screen becomes full of enemy projectiles to the point where no amount of dodging attacks or manoeuvres will keep you alive because any way you go, you end up completely engulfed in enemy projectiles, giving the play no actual way to complete the mission 3. Not enough lives

Graphics, sound and gameplay are good. But the reliance on stars to upgrade aircraft becomes very tedious and the desire to play the game drops significantly. I honestly get bored after one mission because it takes too long to upgrade to a better aircraft and it's almost impossible to find new aircraft parts. Recently I ALWAYS get boring temporal cards with the video ad you can watch to get gifts instead of stars. Why is it so? Are the developers greedy and want me to buy stars? No I won't buy!

star_4.text: One of the greatest mobile shooter/bullet hell games I've played. A newer game called Wing Fighter is so similar that I wanted to verify the game studios were actually different. Either way, this will take many hours of your life away in an exciting adventure, but the latter parts of the later levels are pretty much impossible without spending some money (I assume; I didn't spend much money) or using countless hours (which I did spend already a few years back). Overall, great graphics, pretty decent gameplay.

Somehow really addicted to this. I went ahead and bought no ads + 2x star for $4 in total. So far the game progresses well. The only issue with moving the plane with finger is that my own finger blocks the screen. Sometimes can't see the projectiles from enemies. Other thing is that the screen isn't really "full" in mobile. You might miss some enemies / people due to this. They should add some arrows to indicate there's enemy / people on the other side of the screen.

This is honestly the best shooting game, in my opinion. However, I'm stuck because I've spent actual money over the YEARS upgrading my plane to its FULLEST EXTENT provided, but I can't seem to get past Level 10 because I'm still too weak to conquer those higher levels!!! I still play the levels I've beaten over and over again, but I need to know how I can unlock the others!!! 😭 I've been trying with no luck! Nonetheless, I do recommend this game ❤️🙌🏾

This game is highly polished, looks and sounds amazing. The gameplay is as good as any mobile shmup. Definitely worth paying for. Would be five stars if one thing was changed: Enemy bullets shouldn't hide under bonus items. Destroying a group of planes will leave a cloud of stars to collect. Enemy bullets fired toward you will hide under them, and will damage or destroy your ship invisibly as you pass through the stars. This is incredibly frustrating. Please change the render order.

The graphics in the second version of "Sky Force 2014" is also Amazing for a small screen!!! but I am truly disappointed that in this version it also takes a very long to upgrade your ship!! and especially to aquire other ships or co-pilots! as well as again you are not allowed 4 rapid fire missles on your ships! nor are you allowed 2 wingmen!! within the first third of game play; again when you pick-up extra hearts, those are not used First! before your ship starts taking damage! additionally,

For those people complaining about the ads. I don't work for free. You don't work for free. Why should the developer work for free? If the ads bother you, just pay the $2 for the game. Pros: Addictive game play. Cons: Each level is much harder than the next making you repeat levels a lot so you can get the upgrades needed to actually complete the next level. Which is OK to a point, but this game seems to do it a tad more than I would like.

All the moving around that's needed does a number on your finger. The bottom three powerups (Laser, Shield, Mega Bomb) aren't worth getting because you still have to use stars to activate them at the beginning of levels even though you supposedly bought them with stars you've earned. And you have no control over when the missiles or cannons are fired. They fire on their own every so often in addition to the main gun. There should be more control over what's being shot and when.

Oddly satisfying, very challenging, vertical scrolling shoot-em-up. Light on microtransactions, disabling ads in my opinion is a must (costs $1.99) and like so few titles on Android offline play is available (meaning you can play without using any network features unlike newer game titles). Graphics are very nice on Android and for those who don't know this game is available on a great many devices. 60FPS on S8 and up. You'll probably hit 60 even on less powerful devices except in later stages.

Late game for the harder difficulties, temporal cards might as well not exist because you never see them, the ship abilities are good for main game but there's nothing to increase their power late game, the pilots you unlock are also weak and barely do much for survivability or achievement hunting. I love this game but you will be pulling your hair out trying to get every damn star on every difficulty. I wish devs would see this but they'll say git gud when I have countless hours in this game.

love the game but when i play tournament the graphics flips out pink and green so you cant see and sometimes you just blow up for no reason , if someone can tell me how to fix that ill give this game 5 stars
Upgraded graphics, better controls and exciting upgrades. If it is possible please add humans rescued on screen and enemy destroyed % which will help in emerging in game.
I have loved this game since the nokia era, I wish for more missions and more available plane upgrades because some missions are too hard even with all upgrades maxed.
I had a max account linked to Google play games. now all it shows is some 80k stars that has nothing to do with my beginner space ship.
this weekend for the tournament that's the retro style one, I'm unable to see enemy fire and keep getting hit unaware of where to dodge
Great fun but very grindy. Plenty of upgrades. Seasonal events. Tournaments with friends.

Really love this game. But I hate that I'm going to give it 4 points. Because one thing that bothers me so much about this game is technician and cards upgrades take too long to get, and it causes fun to gradually disappear till you get bored farming for lot of stars and hate to play the same level again and again. (Right now, I defeated all hard levels but still got 4 technicians, 5 cards, lol.) I really wish the cards' drop rates were higher and it will be more fun.

This is one of my favourite mobile game. The graphics are pretty good, the enemies are rather interesting, the bosses are challenging, etc. I highly recommend this game. The only thing to complain about is the upgrades. When you get very far in the game, the upgrades become stupidly expensive. Plus the wait time... It s a very grindy game. Otherwise, it s great. I do recommend getting the steam version of the game, even though it costs. Upgrades are cheaper and don't take time.

This game is by far the best shoot em up games for mobile. However, it has few levels with extreme increase in difficulty that require why too much grinding it become tedious. I don't want to play the same level 100 time to upgrade the plane. However, I have almost finished it all stars on the insane difficulty with out spending any money. It is enjoyable enough to keep me coming back. I just wish if there was more to it.

Good game, very enjoyable and has a lot of things to do. Although i think that fast rockets are too overpowered, as the rocket shooter shoot your character immediately as they come on screen, and due to their speed, it can be almost impossible to dodge in time. (unless you are supposed to memorise the maps) I think it would be good if the rockets only shot once they have been on screen for a couple seconds, rather than instantly, or maybe give them a range, slower rockets or have limited ammo.
the best fighter mission game in the play store but it content too much ads please sky force remove it or content little ads preety good game must try out and its low mb + offline

star_5.text: I've played this on & off for about 3 years after maxing out all the upgrades, it's still my go-to shooter when I'm not at home, and I think it really is one of the best shooters ever made. NOW, I see the devs have added a special holiday themed tournament level, and it is GLORIOUS. All the enemy vehicles have been replaced with things like flying cake slices with candy cane propellor blades, giant snowmen that fire laser beams from their eyes, it's just beautiful. Much appreciated!

Hard but fun! Gorgeous but definitely grindy. Yes upgrades are slow and you have to work for it, but little by little the levels you had trouble with start to get easier. Every negative reviewier wants instant gratification, but then you'd get bored of it quickly. Even though sometimes it's frustrating, I kind of like that the cards and boosts move around so you don't know when you'll find them. It makes it more exciting when you earn it. If you don't have patience, don't play. Very fun though

What a fun and beautiful shooter! Perfectly balanced - challenging without being too hard. Stunning graphics with great sounds effects, plus lots of ship upgrades to help you win on later levels. Hands down the best shooter I've ever played. You can 100% play without paying, but I bought a couple things I wanted to speed up upgrades and to support the devs. There's an earlier version of this (Sky Force 2014) that plays the same and is just as good! These are by far the best in class!

Was going to give 5 stars cause it's a great game. Has decent controls, the gameplay loop is my style, focusing on perfecting levels instead of blazing through content. But it has forced ads. I would've paid for an ad free experience but there's either no option for that, or the menus are too confusing for me to find the option. I take it back, I found the ad removal iap. Great work guys.

Most games ill put down after a few days.i got this one and three more and i have yet to get away from this one. This is a very fun and beautiful game. there are not too many levels but you can increase the difficulty setting once you complete the goals for more stars (for more upgrades). Being able to upgrade different componets of your ship is what kept me hooked! One of the best games i have ever played on a phone.

Really fun game. Great graphics. Little details like wounded planes having spiral crashes is a nice touch. Repeating levels to farm stars and try to meet objectives is fun, not boring. There are small, one time purchase options for things like no ads and double star rewards. I really like this form of in app purchase, very reasonable. No bugs that I noticed. I tested the game in airplane mode and the double star rewards did not occur. This is the closest to a bug I found.

Best game of it's kind, period! Very challenging from beginning to as far as you can get. Each Stage has 4 levels, 4 goals each to pass each level. You build up your plane by collecting stars along the way, the stars in turn let you buy shields, lasers, and mega bombs to help you get through the levels. I have never purchased anything to help me in this game. The graphics are excellent, great detail, color and sound. Humorous opponent. Very addicting!

Everything we loved about the first game- now improved with amped up awesome graphics and new game mechanics. Fun to play, engaging, easy to pick up for new players, and highly addictive. Challenging (you're going to crash, a lot) but not so frustrating that you stop. Excellent game! Great support from the developer- constant stream of updates and new levels! No obtrusive ads and a well established community. The best shooter for the platform.

Very, very well made game. Support a good developer! Progressive and challenging. Fun for adults and children alike. You have limited lives - and upgrades on timers. Reached level 11, full insane on 7+ levels in two weeks. Virtually no armor or shield upgrades. Level 6 primary, 4 cannons. It's possible if you play smart, but it's hard. Trying to get past level 11 without power ups is much harder. I didn't make a purchase till level 10 insane, and it's well worth $2 for 2x stars or no ads.

Very fun! I love how it's very difficult to get all medals for each mission, the challenge is great. in a weird way it feels like a souls game, you fight a boss like 5 times each time learning how to beat them. The upgrades are fun too. Only thing I dislike is that I wish you could play missions you have 100% on for free without spending an energy. I don't like how you only get 10 energy at a time. Overall great game. EDIT: just realized you can watch a short ad for energy. Upped to 5 stars.

This is the only game that matters! Well done to the developer. I remember the good old arcade game titled "task force harrier". Additional reviews after a few updates: it's becoming harder to complete, cannot join other players due to flatform differences, add to that the nightmare stages is close to impossibility to complete, thus just downgrading the 5 🌟 to just three. I dare the developer(s) who playing the games to complete it?

Absolutely the best of this style of game available on the app store. I've tried many others, I keep coming back to this one years and years later, on every phone I've had since 2017. It's genuinely fun, immersive, and you don't have to spend money to progress at a reasonable rate. Though, I have spent money on it. I still can't beat the super hard stuff, but it's fun to try. Accept no imitations, this is the scroller-shooter you want.

An absolute worthy sequel to Skyforce 2014. Its truly this style of game used to its full potential. Great bosses, fantastic enemy variety, and banger music just like the first. You also cant get repeats of cards in this game. The ship types and scientists are great additions, giving you variety and customization for going into levels. Wait I just remembered level 5 exists so 0/5 stars. (Jk) Keep up the great work! Would love to see a 3rd installment to the series in the future!

Great game but the upgrades become exponentially slower to grind for over as you level up. The no-ads and double stars in app purchase is cheap and i actually considered it worth it even though i usually do not spend on mobile games. Quality, polished experience & developer is not too greedy. However if you are starting to get tired of the grind check out Wing Fighter, its eerily similar but the upgrades are faster and more varied lol.

Never has a game made me hate it so much, but also keep bringing me back again and again. That feeling of clearing a level with an ounce of health left, or saving yourself from a barrage of missiles, lasers, and energy blasts, or getting that card/part you happened to find is such a rush. Great free-to-play, and the paid stuff is super worth it. If you want a truly challenging and rewarding bullet hell game, this is the one for you.

Such an addictive bullet hell/shoot 'em up. I am absolutely loving this title. One of the better aspects here is the upgrade system which doesn't rely too heavily on paying to win. Sure, you have only so many "lives" to play with and they do regenerate over a long period of time (sometimes a half an hour), but the quality of the game is so top notch I instantly forgive the "cool down timer" needed to replay missions etc. I highly recommend this smooth shooter.

This game has excellent gameplay reminiscent of arcade games of the genre, very smart design when it comes to objectives and power ups, and best of all: non-predatory microtransactions. You can buy lives with the in-game currency at an extremely reasonable rate once you get about 1/4 through the game, and The real world money you would spend either helps those lives come back faster, removes ads, or doubles the acquisition of in-game currency (which scales at a reasonable rate to the upgrades)

If you like the kind of games where you swipe your finger across the screen and create complete mayhem to your enemy in a futuristic environment with top tier graphics and sound then this could be the game for you. I have a blu view 5 and sometimes at the boss level it caused fatal lag during gameplay but most times ran smooth. Powerful graphics package.

This is THE BEST shooter on playstore and probably the best since Raiden. BIG congrats to the designers and developers. If I could give more stars, I would. This game is fun & challenging. The graphics are really good and the gameplay is smooth. While it does take a while to build up your arsenal (I recommend getting the star doubler), it is helpful. Replaying the easy levels to earn stars prepares you for the difficulty increases. Stage three has the highest star payout in the early stages.

this game is great for first 100 hours then becomes very difficult... at that point it's no longer fun for me. still give 5 stars because it's awesome game but bit too difficult on later stages to enjoy it. I've spent money on all upgrades, the developers deserve it for such a great game but I'm too frustrated with it to attempt to complete all stages/levels.
